title: the durable-execution PROCESS run (design gate)
manager: Before any survival code is written, the two-model blind-design cycle — the same PROCESS the receipts spec went through — because this era was priced at a paragraph in the corpus but is actually Temporal's hardest terrain: durable execution done right. The output of that design cycle IS this era's real spec. The paragraph is a placeholder for work that has to be designed carefully and adversarially, or it will be subtly, expensively wrong.
cs: PROCESS.md 00-09 flow; the cold brief covers persistence contract, effect recording, crash-mid-macrostep, delivery semantics, snapshot schema evolution; conformance-sketch gate before any normative text.
